mapper.select: SELECT n.id AS notebook_id, n.card_id, c.word, c.general_meaning, c.extended_meaning, c.example_sentence, c.memory_tip, c.pronunciation, c.pos FROM notebook n JOIN cards c ON n.card_id = c.id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.next_review_at <= NOW() ORDER BY n.next_review_at ASC LIMIT 50
